summary: Phase 36 — full backend + targeted UI testing. All 15 pytest cases PASSED (signed-URL, Internal Tasks CRUD + RBAC + admin dispatchers, Commercials One-Time Setup Fee + invoice flag + payment auto-flip, type change regression). UI smoke verified Internal Tasks page renders with all 4 stat cards, New Task dialog opens with all form fields (title, description, assignee, priority, category, datetime-local due, email reminder, tags). Login + navigation work as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: routers/internal_tasks.py — solid RBAC via original_role (correctly distinguishes real internal users from role-expanded UI-only super_admins). _ensure_internal returns 403 as expected. Verified.
routers/commercials.py update_commercial L1330-1338 — one_time_fee_status auto-set to 'pending' only when status was previously unset; respects waived/paid. Good.

routers/commercials.py create_invoice L1455-1458 — atomically flips one_time_fee_status to 'invoiced' AND records one_time_fee_invoice_id only when payload.is_one_time_fee AND commercial.one_time_fee_amount > 0. Defensive. Verified end-to-end.
routers/commercials.py payment handler L1556-1560 — flips one_time_fee_status to 'paid' when the linked invoice fully clears. Verified via test_record_full_payment_flips_to_paid.
DocumentUpload signed-URL flow — backend returns {url, preview_url}; fetching the signed URL without Authorization succeeds (200). CORS-credentials issue is solved by token-in-querystring approach.
Minor: internal_tasks._enrich uses `l` as variable name (E741 ambiguous) — cosmetic, not a bug.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (smoke — Internal Tasks page renders, all 4 stat cards present, New Task dialog opens with all fields)

test_credentials: super_admin admin@vyapaarnetwork.com / admin123 ; customer john@testco.com / test123 used for non-admin RBAC test (403 confirmed).
seed_data_creation: Test created and deleted: 1 internal task ('TEST_E2E task'), 1 invoice (TEST-OTF-*) on an existing recurring commercial with 15000 INR Onboarding fee and a 15000 INR payment. Commercial mutation (one_time_fee_* fields) left in 'paid' state on whichever recurring commercial was first in the list.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 36 fully verified. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_phase36.py is a reusable regression suite — re-run with `pytest backend/tests/test_phase36.py -v`. The OneTimeSetupFee tests mutate the first recurring commercial returned by /api/commercials?type=recurring — if a clean test commercial is needed, create a dedicated fixture commercial. Document signed-URL test skips if no documents exist on any lead; current data has at least one document so it ran and passed.
